name: rapstudio-v8
description: Rap Studio mobile web app with engine and integration modules

scripts.verify: python -c "import pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('rapstudio_v8.html'); s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'); assert 'id=\"s-tools\"' in s and 'runIntegrationChecks()' in s; print('verify ok')"
